mcgltf.config.title: Settings
mcgltf.config.mesh.desc: Draw with the GL mesh-shader pipeline when no shader pack is active, reducing CPU submit overhead.
mcgltf.config.shaderskin.desc: With a shader pack active, skin skeletons on the GPU via a compute shader and write into the gbuffer (formerly deep-water path).
mcgltf.config.thumbnails.desc: Show a rotatable model thumbnail above the hovered model in command suggestions.
mcgltf.config.itemrender.desc: Model items render the real glTF in hand/inventory; when off, show a flat glTF/GLB icon by extension.
mcgltf.config.hud.desc: Show the selected instance's index / model / transform / gizmo mode at the top-left of the screen.
